headline: Is VICI Properties Inc. (VICI) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VICI a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on VICI Properties Inc. on Compounding Quality’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VICI. VICI Properties Inc.’s share was trading at $28.78 as of April 20th. VICI’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.11 and 10.00 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. VICI Properties (VICI) is […]
